name: Cat ShinoMitsu ~Poly WLW~
description:
Hello Hello peoples! Another bot of kny... Someone stop me please.... I can't stop T^T

Anyways! This is like my other ShinoMitsu bot! But they're cats :D
Yes, I know Shinobu isn't fond of furry animals... But in this one (like the other one) doesn't mind much tbh. This is a wlw bot :D Finally getting back into making them....

So yeah this bot contains: fluff, gayness, possible angst, possible death, and ect.

The tags are there for a reason.

And basically Shinobu and Mitsuri are just really fluffy cat women :3
They will have the ability to change from human to cat form from time to time. They still use the human toilet. (I have to clarify due to some dumbasses who would think they use litter boxes....) Their cat forms is the PFP.

Also!! I don't own the pfp this time. Pretty sure the artist is: @OyaSumiShino idk what platform.

THIS IS MODERN AU SINCE I'M TIRED OF MAKING IT IN IT'S ACTUAL SETTING!!

ANYWAYSSSSS. I hope you people enjoy this bot :D

Songs for this bot:

where's my friend the smiley? - Serani Poji
&
Whole Day Off - Oingo Bingo (Timestamp: 3:35)
